No grading is included with this permit.; • Remove the fence (if needed only) to gain access to the backyard and place it back at the end of the project. • Drain pool if necessary • Disconnect Utilities (water, and electrical) • Remove and haul away pool equipment (Pump, filter, and heather) • Electrical lines to be removed from pool panel. For drainage purpose - Demolition – House, Shed, Pool or other Structure (NOT for fire repair)

project_name: PG&E ROCKLIN SEISMIC + BUILDING ENVELOPE UPGRADES PACKAGE
project_description: PG&E ROCKLIN SEISMIC + BUILDING ENVELOPE UPGRADES PACKAGE - B,DIV.2 - VACANT. **ELECTRONIC SUBMITTAL - PIONEER PROGRAM TO INTERWEST** III-N.NR THIS PROJECT IS BEING PHASED Scope includes all seismic upgrades required for existing 71,355 SF vacant building at 3625 Cincinnati Ave, Rocklin, CA. Seismic upgrades will include: new braces frames; new columns/foundations to strengthen roof framing; re-nail roof diaphragm; connections between roof member throughout building; strengthening of the 4x12’s and Glu-Lams; additional roof to wall connections; improve panel to panel connections; frame in existing mechanical openings; new openings and infill at existing openings; dry rot repairs at roof. Included in this package are Building Envelope improvements including: complete roof replacement with TPO roof and insulation; parapet details for updated south parapet to meet code distance requirement from adjacent building; replacement and/or addition of scuppers, downspouts and overflows; exterior window replacement; infill and new Openings at existing concrete wall for tenant improvement floor plan; and infill at the niche between the existing 1979 building and the 1986 addition. LRA - NO WUI FULLY SPRINKELED PLACER COUNTY FIRE P.D. . **SPECIAL INSPECTIONS REQUIRED - SEE APPROVED AGREEMENT FOR DETAILS** ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- REV1 ENGINEER JUDGEMENT FOR FIRE RATING OF JOINT ASSEMBLY AT EXTERIOR CONCRETE PANELS - FINAL REVIEW BY INTERWEST 03/22/2022. -BH - Warehouse TI

project_name: AREA: R07:  Repairs After Fire Damage
project_description: AREA: R07: Repairs After Fire Damage - Fire damage repair to existing single-family residence. Scope includes replacement of approximately 324 SF of 5/8" ceiling drywall, 127 SF of 1/2" wall drywall, and 86 LF of tape joint tie-ins; replacement of approximately 239 LF of 4:12 roof trusses and 494 SF of 1/2" CDX roof sheathing; full re-roof with approximately 23 squares of laminated composition shingles and associated flashing, venting, ridge/hip cap, drip edge, and starter. project_description: Pipe Burst, Inversion Liner, Drain Repipe: Sewer Line Replacement or Repair. - Sewer line replacement or emergency repair of sewer line only. No other work is permitted.; -TTC will replace approximately 110 FT of 2 inch Cast Iron secondary drain pipe with new 2 inch ABS plastic pipe. -TTC will replace approximately 25FT of existing 4 inch Cast Iron drain pipe from the toilet connection in the crawl space to the ABS plastic wye located on the outside of the foundation, with new 4 inch ABS plastic pipe. -TTC will replace approximately 45FT of existing 4 inch Cast Iron and Asbestos Cement sewer pipe from the two-way clean out located behind the house to the 4 inch ABS plastic County clean out located by the fence, with new 4 inch HDPE SDR17 sewer pipe. -TTC will utilize the excavation at the county clean out location to pipeline approximately 7FT of existing 4 inch Asbestos Cement and Clay pipe downstream to the County mainline connection. - Residential Sewer Replacement

project_description: AREA: R01: Fence - I am wanting to re-build the front section of my fence where the gate is to my side yard. My total height would be 8 feet. It will be a 6’ fence with a 2’ lattice top. It is a very small section. The only part that will be 8 feet is about 88” from the house to the upper graded area. project_description: KOPP - UNDERGROUND ELECTRICAL SERVICE - Project consists of working with PG&E to go underground with our electrical service from their pole to our house. Existing electric transformer is across Ridge Road from our house. The new pole will be planted on our property on the house-side of Ridge Road so no trenching under Ridge Road is necessary. The new pole will be placed in the existing PG&E easement on our property, so no new easements are required. From that pole, we will trench ~170 feet to our house, ending at the location of our existing electric panel. The old 200A meter main will be removed, the new meter main will be upsized to 400A. The trench is multi-purpose, it will include both electric and telephone (no gas). CURRENT PANEL AMPERAGE: 200 PROPOSED PANEL AMPERAGE:N- 400A SPLIT N- 1-200A W/ E-100A BRK TO E-125A SUB PANEL TO TRANSFER SWITCH 2ND 200A BRK DERATED TO 175A W/60A E-PV W/ 100A BRK TO E-125A SUB PANEL CHANGE OUT / NEW: Change Out - Upgrade WITH PORTABLE GENERATOR AND EXISTING SOLAR PERMIT # BLD18-04691 ****-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- REVISION 6/24/21: CHANGING MSP FROM 400A TO 200A FOR SERVICE TO HOUSE - REVIEWED RM - Electrical
